title: Commit Message Artifact
description: Typed artifact for the commit_message capability (PR-B6). Commit AI adapters emit this payload; operator downstream applies the actual git commit. ao-kernel never executes git commit itself (agent-adapter-contract.schema.v1.json::capabilities[] prohibits commit_write). object-shape is mandatory so InvocationResult.extracted_outputs walker accepts the payload (adapter_invoker._walk_output_parse Mapping check).

schema_version.description: Schema-pinned version literal. Breaking changes ship as commit-message.schema.v2.json.

subject.description: Commit subject line. Conventional Commits format encouraged (type(scope): summary); max length mirrors git's soft limit for subject.

body.description: Optional multi-line commit body. May be blank; Markdown-style paragraphs typical.

breaking_change.description: Flag Conventional Commits BREAKING CHANGE. When true, operator downstream should add '!' to the commit type or include 'BREAKING CHANGE:' trailer per CC spec.

trailers.description: Conventional Commits trailers (Co-Authored-By, Signed-off-by, Refs:, etc.). Each item is the full trailer line (e.g., 'Co-Authored-By: alice <alice@example.com>').
